name: research-ingestion
description: Extract actionable insights from research papers (PDF/URL) and turn them into OpenClaw agent skills, workflow improvements, and concrete techniques.

interface.shortDescription: Extract actionable insights from research papers (PDF/URL) and turn them into OpenClaw agent skills, workflow improvements, and concrete techniques.
interface.longDescription: Obtain paper text via PyMuPDF/pdftotext or web fetch, extract structured insights, and optionally scaffold a new skill.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Research Ingestion safely.
